Figure 2: An overall of Hunyuan3D 2.0 architecture for 3D generation. It consists of two main components: Hunyuan3D-DiT for generating bare mesh from a given input image and Hunyuan3D-Paint for generating a textured map for the generated bare mesh. Figure 3: The overall architecture of Hunyuan3D-ShapeVAE. Instead of only using uniform sampling on mesh surface, We have developed an importance sampling strategy to extract high-frequency detail information from the input mesh surface, such as edges and corners. Figure 4: Overview of Hunyuan3D-DiT. It adopts a transformer architecture with both double- and single-stream blocks. This design benefits the interaction between modalities of shape and image, helping our model to generate bare meshes with exceptional quality. (Note that the orange blocks have no l...

Figure 5: Overview of Hunyuan3D-Paint. We leverage an image delighting module to convert the input image to an unlit state to produce light-invariant texture maps. The system features a double-stream image conditioning reference-net, which provides faithfully conditional image features to the model....
